summary: Single Team subscriber FGotD non-subscribed teams in market - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is a single team subscriber
AND there is a FGotD that doesn't contain the subscribed-to-team
AND the game is scheduled/in-progress in the viewing market of the user
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game is not a partner game

**Example**
Cincinnati Reds subscriber, living in Denver. A Rockies Free Game of the Day will be blacked out

steps.action: WHEN the user views the game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a blackout pill is displayed left aligned at the bottom of the game tile
AND a lock icon is displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header have a dark overlay
AND the FGotD pill does not display in the game tile
